entry.title: Please can someone explain how to unflag for deletion a reference operation set. (cp 431)
Re: Cannot Download AdobeForm Template from SAP Business...
entry.content: (posted by mistake, cannot delete it, sorry)

entry.title: Re: Cannot Download AdobeForm Template from SAP Business...
entry.content: Hi Harshal, Thanks for your reply. As I wrote, the ZIP file was completely empty (0 Bytes), and that was only once. Afterwards, nothing happens - no file download. To address your points: 1) I worked with the form a month ago with no problems - I made multiple down and uploads with changing the form meanhwile with Adobe LiveCycle Designer. I did not use Cloud Application Studio. Your point 2) makes sense. Thanks, Igor

entry.title: Re: Association in CDS View Extension is not exposed in the OData of main CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Nikolas,

Can you explain how you have exposed association targets  in the OData service. I have a similar case where I extended a Standard CDS view to add new Virtual column that is calculated in frontend. But here I need to implement filteration for that field. 

To implement filter I followed the way described in below blog but I am getting that association not defined error. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/filtering-on-association-property-in-fiori-element-app-via-abap-cds-virtual/ba-p/13458892

entry.title: Re: How to Dynamically Update Workflow Steps in SAP Build...
entry.content: Process Variant support was released in the past couple of weeks for Build Process Automation. With this, you can configure the variant selection when you trigger the process.

entry.title: Account determination for interests posting in public cloud
entry.content: I use the Fiori Schedule Interest Calculation job to automatically calculate and post interest. The default GL account for credit interest is set via the account symbol (e.g., 7010000). However, I need to distinguish between domestic, foreign, or related companies based on the business partner (BP) in order to post interest to the correct GL accounts (e.g., 70101000, 70102000, etc.). I can't combine the account symbol with the business partner. SSCUI 106241 and 100297 don't provide a solution. Is there any BAdI available or an easier way?"

entry.title: Re: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Is there a way to switch to the old interface for folks who are just wrapping up a project.

entry.title: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I recently received a question from a customer who is experiencing performance issues with their SFSF Compensation module. These performance drops have been inconsistent so they can be quite unpredictable. Upon these issues, They have asked me about performance monitoring tools that SAP has available. Sometimes, customers can build their own tool to track their system performance.

With this in mind, If anyone has any tools that we can provide for them to help them in finding/developing their own tools. Please let me know so we can organize a meeting/ demonstration.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Corporate IdP (same entity ID) in IAS
entry.content: @steven_foo: Which solution did you end up with?

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Time Management Workshop agenda and Questionnaire
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could anybody lend their expertise or provide their insights for a basic workshop agenda template points and a standard questionnaire to guide the initial discovery and requirements gathering sessions for a fresh SAP SuccessFactors Time Management implementation?

If there are any standard documents or templates provided by SAP for Time Management workshops, please let me know. Any leads or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support and assistance!

Best regards,
Aesha

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Performance Issues in SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP BW/4HANA live connection
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently, I am creating stories (dashboards + tables) in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), I handle all the data preparation in SAP BW/4HANA. There, I have implemented calculation views, composite providers, and BEx queries that fetch data through replication connection via SLT from S/4HANA. Subsequently, using a live connection between BW and SAC, I create models in SAC and then build the stories. The stories simply display the data, and I haven’t implemented any additional calculations.

However, I am facing severe performance issues that I cannot justify, as my dataset is minimal. For instance, one model has only 3,271 rows and 47 columns.

The stories are slow to load, even those that only contain a simple table. This happens across different models that I’ve implemented.

Since I haven’t worked with this specific architecture before, I would greatly appreciate any guidance on where I should start investigating the root cause of these significant performance issues. Any advice would be highly appreciated!

 SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: How to convert binary base64 string to BMP image and upload to SE78 Tx. through program

Hi Sandra_Rossi,

Thank you for your quick response, is there any way we can upload binary base64 string to .BMP extension in SAP ABAP ? and one more thing regarding "specialized software" any idea and which needs to be integrated with SAP.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: DMEE Tables
entry.content:
See OSS note 2820775

It provides an Excel file with the mapping of each FPAYH, FPAYHX and FPAYP field

entry.title: Your user's permissions are not sufficient for accessing the console.
entry.content:
Hi!

I had before access to SAP CDC console, but I asked my manager to delete my access as there were some issues. After that, I asked again for access, I received the mail service from mail-service@gigya-raas.com with the invitation, however, when I add my email, I receive this message: "Email already exists". When I am trying to log in to the console with the same email address, I receive: "Access denied, Your user's permissions are not sufficient for accessing the console."

Can you please help?

entry.title: Re: DME - Can you please let me know the table to check t...
entry.content:
See OSS note 2820775

It contains an Excel file with the source of all fields in  FPAYH, FPAYHX and FPAYP

entry.title: Re: Identity authentication to different Corporate Idp based on email domains in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @vinayakc123 ,

would a similar setup work, where we do not rely in importing the users into IAS in a "pure" proxy Corporate IdP scenario? Basically we want to have two Azure Apps from an Azure IdP point of view that point to the same IAS but different Apps (in our Case SF and IBP hosted on the same IAS).

As far as I can tell (which could easily be wrong) you are using provisioning to route the users to two distinct user groups SSO_Company1 and SSO_Compony2. In our case, if we would need those groups they would e.g. be named "Group_SF" and "Group_IDP"

My questions

  1. Is the provisioning part mandatory and will the users really being created and persisted in the respective user group within IAS or will they only be virtually mapped to the user group on-demand and not being persisted?
  2. Is there a way to have two IdPs like "Azure_SF" and "Azure_IBP" without the Concept of Groups?

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: Re: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content:
Hi @niallwalker98 

I am not aware of a Performance monitoring tool however I made this blog a few years ago about configurations that lead to latency:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-avoid-latency-in-the-compensation-module/ba-p/13494045

If you create a ticket to support our engineers can use Splunk to determine exactly what is causing the latency (they will see pages and pages of code when the latency is happening and will be able to say what the issue is pretty quickly), I've inserted instructions at the bottom of the blogs on getting the x unique id for faster splunk processing.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Base64 String Issues When Posting Attachments via ODa...
entry.content: I think you might be confounded by the description of the api. It is the response that is a JSON structure. The payload for request is binary data containing the file contents. All the parameters (Slug, Content-Type, LinkedSAPObjectKey, BusinessObjectTypeName) have to be set with headers.

entry.title: Re: Calling Secured iFlow from SAPUI5
entry.content: You don't call the integration suite endpoints directly from browser (from UI5 code). You instead call a proxy (reverse) endpoint with which the user have already authenticated. That proxy takes care of the authentication with integration suite endpoint. In a standard BTP application this endpoint will be from approuter (standalone or managed), When using approuter, the integration endpoint can be configured as a destination. Destination service and approuter together takes care of authentication.  You can find material in the community and learning.sap.com on how to go about this in detail. It is the same setup for every UI5 application hosted in BTP. Only the destination configuration changes.

entry.title: API Enterprise Project using SAC and S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have successsfully tested the Enterprise Project API, using the Postman application. With Postman we have simulated this API and were able to create na enterprise project and its WBS Elements.

This is the API link that we've configured to simulate this connection: https://my412440-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_ENTERPRISE_PROJECT_SRV;v=0002/A_EnterpriseProject

To use the API we have created a communication user (TESTEAPIPROJ), a communication system (SAC_S4HANA_PROJ) and the communication arrangement (SAP_COM_0308). We have attached screenshot of the mentioned objects in the document "API Enterprise Project using SAC and S4 Public Cloud.pdf".

The final step would be to connect SAC to the API so that we can create an enterprise project in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system from SAP Analytics Cloud.

In SAC we created a connection (testeodata) with basic authentication type. The user associated to this connection is the communication user that we have used previously in this process. Also, in SAC, we cannot copy the full API link. The system only accepts until https://my412440-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_ENTERPRISE_PROJECT_SRV;v=0002

However, in this system, we are not able to specify the method to call the previously mentioned API.

How should we proceed to connect both systems using this API?

Best regards,

Francisco

entry.title: Re: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content: Hi Xavier, We are looking for examples of custom tools. if you are aware of customers creating their own, but I have forwarded the blog post and your comments to colleagues. I will let you know if I hear anything back.

entry.title: How to activate Add, Edit button in app "Manage Commodity Codes"?
entry.content: I have an issue that I cannot edit or add commodity codes in app "Manage Commodity Codes". The buttons are invisible. How can I enable them?

entry.title: Missing IBAN Services from SAP BTP Service Entitlement / Discovery Center
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Few months back IBAN Services was available as part of SAP BTP service. But recently I don't see this available now in Discovery Center / SAP BTP service entitlement.

I have captured the link and screenshot of the service few months back. But it's not opening now. Is this service decommissioned by SAP, please suggest further.

SAP Discovery Center Service - IBAN service (cloud.sap)
Inital Setup | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Condition Contract - Fixed Amount Distribution in Settlement Document
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

In condition contract, percentage base rebate calculation work as per expectation. It is considering negative value such as credit note or cancel invoice value for rebate base value and accrual also updated in negative amount.

But in case of fixed about based rebate calculation, it's considering all value for rebate base value but accruals is always positive. So, I want to know if this is a standard behavior of fixed amount-based rebate calculation or through configuration/customization we can avoid considering negative value.

Thanks,

Arindam

entry.title: Contingent Worker ID Generation does not work as before
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Contingent Worker ID Generation does not work as before, Emp ID with CW prefix was generated. Now only a number is generated.

After 1H2024 Release, it was possible to opting out of the feature "Enable Centralized Services to Add Contingent Worker and Add Assignment" in Company System and Logo Settings, the Employee ID of Contingent Workers was generated as per the business rule again.

Now it is not possible to opt out "Enable Centralized Services to Add Contingent Worker and Add Assignment" feature. Currently User ID Generation for Contingent Worker follows the "Next Employee ID Assigned" in Company System and Logo Settings. However it does not support alphanumeric values having the CW prefix. 

Do you have the same issue? Have you found any solution to fix this problem? I opened a SAP support ticket and the agent said that there is no solution for this issue. But maybe there is a special workaround what can help to keep the original settings and continue using CW prefix in the Employee ID of the CWs.

Thanks.
Regards,
Szabi

entry.title: Re: How to convert binary base64 string to BMP image and upload to SE78 Tx. through program
entry.content:
Just to be clear, your string of characters in base64 was used to encode a PNG image (based on what you have said). You may encode any sequence of bytes into Base64, it's not related to any format, see here: Base64 - Wikipedia.

So, your question is how to convert PNG to BMP. Try IGS -> https://www.google.com/search?q=abap+convert+png+to+bmp+-jpeg+-jpg+site%3Asap.com.

entry.title: How to print a change output for Purchase Order
entry.content:
After a field in the Purchase Order is updated, the Purchase Order is saved and approved, but no change output is triggered.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to print a change output for Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The information about how to print change output in Purchase Order can be found in the kba:

3547265 - Purchase Order Output Not Updated After Changes and Approval

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: How To Install an SAP HANA Express 2.0 SPS04 VM server for development (on the budget)
entry.content:
write a comment for this "Introduction I'm a software developer so from time to time I have some weird & geek activities at home. Last one was to install my own SAP HANA Express virtual machine at home and I want to share the experience because I'm sure there is some interest about this. Why SAP HANA 2.0 for development ? Because it's the most easy way to have a running platform all-in-one for development with In-memory database with persistency Cloud Foundry landscape Integrated Web-IDE as a running appliance SAML2 identity provider for security You can develop in any programming language supported by Cloud Foundry & CF community You have a running Linux machine with bash shell I downloaded the SAP HANA Express Virtual Appliance (hxexsa.ova file & gettting started pdf) using SAP download java program after registering minimal informations about myself (here) and I imported the appliance to my existing HP DL380 G5 server that was running VMWare ESXi 5.5 (free licence) Following the provided "Getting Started" document I had errors on the first boot regarding some : missing instruction in the CPU. Of course, I searched for help about this and I found some information about it but none of them solved my problem. SAP HANA Express supported hardware Searching the internet I found the official website for hardware compatibility here Unfortunately the list does not provide information about CPU features used by SAP HANA and what is the minimum requirement for version 2.0 SPS04 to run. Using CPU World database compare, I found out the differences between my CPU and the minimum Intel supported platform : SSE4.2 instruction set Another important info that I learned is : SAP HANA is supported on minimum Intel E5-2600 v3 and Power 8 platforms only ! (no AMD processor is supported) So I needed an complete new server with a supported CPU and as you may know servers are expensive and not really for home use as I needed for my development mahine. I searched a lot of time until I found the most cost effective server that is able to run SAP HANA Express virtual appliance : Dell R630 with Intel E5-2630L v3 processors found on Ebay For 590 GBP I got : Dell R630 with 2 x Intel E5-2630L-v3 (8 core) processors and 64 GB of RAM. For HDDs I installed an NVMe SSD drive (HP EX920 512GB) using M.2 PCIe x4 adapter (from Delock) mounted in PCIe Riser 3 card and used for fast storage (HANA VM imported here) and fast datastore for OS made of 2 x Samsung Evo860 500GB SSD configured in RAID1, and really cheap refurbished 2 x Samsung 1TB 2.5" 5400rpm drives configured in one RAID1 volume just for backup. Host OS (VM Ware ESXi 6.7u3) I choose the ESXi 6.7u3 because it's free and it has no RAM limit in the latest version for 2 processor servers. It has a very nice web interface, and most of all it has ready to use images with drivers by the hardware vendors (both Dell and HPE have for download pre-configured versions for their servers) which is great because they are easy to download and install. It can be downloaded from the hardware support portal of your server supplier or directly from VMWare Tips for new NVMe PCIe drives & ESXi 6.7u3 be sure that your PCIe lanes are configured properly (for Dell R630 the BIOS has PCIe bifurcation which needs to be set to "x4 x4 x4 x4" and the drive has to be in Riser 3 or 2) not all NVMe drives are visible and accesible from boot, some of them work with OS level drivers (HP EX920 included) If NVMe drive controller is not visible you might need to copy the nvme.v00 file from v6.5u2 iso to v6.7u3 iso after burning or flashing the OS install drive (more info here) Importing VM with OVF Tool Because the hxexsa.ova image file it has over 15GB, the best way to import the virtual machine is to use the command line OVF Tool ovftool --disableVerification --noSSLVerify --datastore=datasatoreName --network="VM Network" hxexsa.ova vi://root@esxi.yourdomain.com Official OVF Tool help may be found here Using HXE VM is easy There is a pretty good start-up guide of almost 20 pages of how to start your HANA experience when you download the image, but there are a lot of example apps and tutorials published by SAP : https://developers.sap.com/topics/sap-hana.html https://github.com/SAP/hana-shine-xsa/tree/HANA2.0-SPS03 Conclusions As a developer or an small ISV company you can have your own SAP HANA 2.0 SPS04 platform running on cheap hardware for play. I managed to get up and running for development an SAP HANA Express Virtual Machine with less than 1,000 EUR budget for hardware & software. Use Intel CPUs supported, minimum E5-2600 v3 family for server and at least 16GB or RAM (32GB will run better) even if the VM works on new i7 & i9 desktop & laptop machines. Did I mentioned that SAP HANA Express Edition is available for free, for development and productive use, up to 32GB of RAM?"

Thanks for sharing your experience with setting up SAP HANA Express on your home server! It's always inspiring to see how fellow developers tackle such geeky projects. Your detailed guide on hardware compatibility and your personal journey from initial setup challenges to finding a cost-effective solution is incredibly helpful.

It's great to know that you've managed to get SAP HANA Express up and running with a budget under 1,000 EUR. Your insights on choosing the Dell R630 with Intel E5-2630L v3 processors and the use of NVMe SSD drives are particularly useful. I also appreciate the tips on configuring PCIe lanes and dealing with NVMe drives visibility issues in ESXi 6.7u3.

For anyone looking to set up their own SAP HANA development environment, your experience and advice will definitely be invaluable. Kudos on a job well done, and thanks again for sharing all these resources and tips!

entry.title: Re: The 2H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Key Highlights

My items are not appearing in the libraries after over a week of creating the item and having added them to a library.

entry.title: Re: Results are not saved in QA32 tcode using BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
entry.content: Hi, did you solved the problem ?

entry.title: Re: "Reason" field in the "Reason for movement" cutomizin...
entry.content:
While you enter Reason code , the Reason for Movement text/s will be defaulted in MIGO for that movement type and for you case reason code 1 corresponds to "Poor quality" which is already defined in standard for your movement type.

If you wanted - you too can create a new  Reason code /a key number as 15 having a Reason for Movement /texts as Duplicate  Entry for your movement type in the below said path.

**** Like you have plant code and plant name description - you can have Reason code and Reason code description on Reason for Movement for a movement type!

entry.title: Re: Does SAP SLT support Azure SQL Database as a source
entry.content:
Microsoft Azure is explicitly stated as not supported with SLT in 1768805 - SAP Landscape Transformation Replication Server (SLT): Non ABAP-based Sources: "Especially Microsoft Azure is NOT supported (see SAP Note 2497147)."

There is no workaround for this.

entry.title: Re: How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

I configured flexible workflow and receiving emails as well. Is there any possibility to add recipients who are not approvers as CC in purchase order approved email. we are using Fiori 23 and don't have access to Manage your solution fiori app. Please advise 

@KjetilKilhavn @rosydp

entry.title: Re: How to get rid of Close Document Prompt ?
entry.content:
This isn't just a 4.2 to 4.3 change. We are on 4.3 SP03 Patch 8 in our production system and the use case you are describing generates the following message...

Not sure exactly with which patch this changed, but now it is as you are seeing.

It would be nice if there was a workaround for this, but I do not expect it.

Noel

I'm developing an MDK app connected to an on-prem system via Cloud Connetor. Dowload data work fine but when I update an value an try to synch data, I have the following error : Failed to find a matched endpoint Error 404 Merge.
I follwod a note for a similar issue (2937713 : Changed the virtial host name in Cloud connector and set the Rewrite URL) but still have the issue.

Did some one have the same issue or know how to solve this please?

Thank you !

entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Trying to execute the scope Basic Bank Account Management (BFA) we have noticed that the app Manage bank accounts doesn’t appear to create the payment group, we tried to create using CBC however is not reflecting the right way at Fiori

Reference test done:

Manage Bank Account App

Select the bank account and click on go in the upper right.

Displaying on the screen click on Edit in the upper right.

Search for: Payment Approvers

When we click on approver group we cannot find any group created

 

CBC configuration done:

We created the group “test”

Can you please check the reason for this “error”? Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,

entry.title: Items not appearing in library despite being uploaded into LMS for more than 72hrs
entry.content:
We have created several items recently in our LMS and added them to a library for users to assign to themselves. As of right now, the items do not appear in the results when searching by title or by item ID. I read in the following KBA (3511612 - New Learning Experience: Enhanced Search), that in the production environment, it can take up to 8 hours for the items to appear searchable in a library. However, in this case it has been 2 weeks and the items are still not visible.

- I have verified that all the items are in the same library

- I have verified that my admin account and those who need to access this training have access to the library

- We have the new learning homepage turned on since the release and turned off the toggle functionality to revert back to the old learning homepage. That said, If I go into the LMS as an admin and then proxy as a user in the LMS to see their learning homepage and search for the course, the old learning module page appears prior the release and there the items do appear in the search results. 

- I have verified all the configurations and the role permissions for regular learning users in our organization

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP BTP and On-Premise SAP Business One using the SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi @EunSeok_Bang 

First of all, I want to thank you because with this post I was able to successfully configure SAP Business One with Destinations.

I would add a reference image so that you can configure the Destination correctly.

Best regards,

Erick

entry.title: High level decription of Brazilian eSocial processing
entry.content:
Processing steps
 
1. Data gathering
Every eSocial event has its own Data Processing/Generation class (SE24). They can be identified in view V_T7BREFD_EVTYPE (standard) or V_T7BREFD_EVTY_C (customer) for each event. The customer table overwrites the standard table entries, if the same key exists.
 
Example entry of event S-1010 with processing class
 
The purpose of this class is to read data from the system and progressively 'assemble' the event data in the given layout. The layout is provided by the standard system for all events, including 'out of HCM scope' events that the customer must implement in the Framework, for example SST or Worker Process events. More info on how to create custom events in the attachments of note 1920686 - eSocial: FAQ.
So, in order to identify data or conditions problems, the best place to look is the processing class. All events are generated by calling the common method 'Process', when this step is finished all the data is filled in the event record, one record per event.
Inside the Processing class all the event customer BAdIs are called in order to compose parts of the event where the standard normally doesn't have the data within HCM.
For all 3 types of eSocial events (table, periodic, non periodic) this is the same. There are different generation programs for the types, but every event has its own Processing Class with roughly the same structure.
 
2. Change Manager
When all events are generated by the Processing class above, the records are passed to the 'Change Manager'. The event key is compared to existing events already in the database, and depending on the status, the system takes an approach:
a. The event has no correspondent key. A new event is generated in order to be sent.
b. The event has an existing key. If the existing event:
Is not sent or has an error, the new one takes its place to be sent to the government.
Is sent and has receipt, the new one is created as a rectification and it will be sent again.
c. If the generator has NOT created an event for the period, and the event already exists and was sent for that period:
The system creates a new deletion event to be sent.
 
The Change Manager also utilizes the Conversion Class, also listed in view V_T7BREFD_EVTYPE (standard) or V_T7BREFD_EVTY_C (customer), in order to avoid generating rectifications in special cases, for example in eSocial layout changes. There are standard conversion classes but the customer can copy/customize them if needed.
So, if you are wondering why some event is being rectified, deleted or updated, this step can be investigated in detail. Most of the logic is standard, with the exception of the customer created Conversion Class for this processing.
 
3. XML Generation, Signature and Sending
The standard solution provides transformations, XML generation, signature and sending for all events including the 'out of HCM scope'. The customer events, if properly integrated in the framework, will be handled the same as the standard events.
Certificates must be imported in the system for event signature, more details in the blog post HCM Brazil eSocial: Connecting and testing your digital certificates for eSocial SOA Manager 
The eSocial communication package is implemented in SOAManager, more info:
  • SAP Note 2514483 - eSocial - SOA Manager - configuration of web service for communication to eSocial restricted production environment.
  • SAP Note 2585709 - eSocial - SOA Manager - configuration of web service for communication to eSocial production environment.
 
I hope this helps for troubleshooting some technical problems that might arise in the eSocial day to day use.

entry.title: Multiple selection ListPicker can anyone give me a hint?
entry.content: Hi community, I am using multiple select ListPicker for a mobile services application, and when querying it does not show the data but only one, I am using #selectedValue, does anyone know what tag I should use to show all the selected data when querying, thank you very much.

entry.title: Service entry sheet deleted but not in PO history
entry.content:
Hello Guys

I have deleted a service entry sheet but in purchase order history it is showing positive amount against the deleted service entry sheet. SAP is not allowing me to perform any changes in the deleted SES.

Obs: The movement 102 is done and with the negative amount in the PO Story. But the value of the SES its not zero, as it should be.

Any solution ? Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to activate Add, Edit button in app "Manage Commo...
entry.content: I think you need to have some record in the table before you can use those button

entry.title: Re: HANA - /hana/shared//xs/app_working//executionroot fo...
entry.content:
I try using a HANA cockpit server, in my case i use this note 2775467 - XSA - Huge log files are being generated in "/hana/<...>/executionroot" folder - Best Practices for analysis - SAP for Me help me to fix it.

Add the following property to the xscontroller.ini file, under the [general] section:

Controller.Balancer.MaxStoredDroplets=1
  
Note: Reducing MaxStoredDroplets will reduce the possibility of further log analysis as no old logs (e.g. from previous crashes) will be available.

Working better, remove or move files was not an option for my case.

entry.title: N_ADICAO em IT_NFE_PROD_DI quando for informado DUImp em IT_NFE_PROD_DI.N_DI como fazemos?
entry.content:
Olá, 

Se trata de um campo opcional o N_ADICAO, porém, ao deixar em branco, é gerado mesmo assim com o valor 000. Não é possível que não gerem essa tag? Pois é um campo opcional quando se trata de DUImp.

entry.title: Re: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content: I've never heard of custom tools. There is a Chrome extension called Page Load time that is useful to try to get a sense of how long a page takes to open and which I always use when asked to troubleshoot latency issues. Number 1 reason however when looking for the reason is a configuration decision that was deviating from standard, especially a decision to have all employees into one worksheet instead of creating a worksheet for each manager and using executive review to give extended access to specific people.

entry.title: Re: Insights Needed: Managing Complex Relationships with...
entry.content:
Hi @ALAE1 

Here is information about the 2nd Manager hierarchy: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/how-compensation-hierarchies-are-used-and-configured-for-compensation/ba-p/13473441

You can use a combination of 2nd Manager Hierarchy and Executive Review access (you can leverage the latest Executive Review based on routemap step feature from 2H 2024)

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Customer/Vendor integration (CVI) SAP notes
entry.content: Thanks, vey helpful indeed. Is is possible to share the sequencing of the notes application please?

entry.title: Automatic payments – payment data is not transferred to Payment proposal
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When performing Automatic payments, payment data is entered in journal entry or assigned in App Manage Supplier Line Items.

When the payment proposal is created, this payment data is lost and payment needs to be reallocated again.

The error shown in exceptions is No Valid Payment Method Found

In app Manage Automatic Payments in View Log the following is displayed 


goto View log herein you will see the following stated 
> House bank is selected ...
> No suitable bank can be selected for comp.code & pmnt meth. & curr. &  (& in place of actual values shown)
> No permitted payment method exists 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automatic payments – payment data is not transferred...
entry.content:
See referenced in the help.sap.com documentation 

Manage Automatic Payments: FAQ
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/031c345485b84c8c94265be9ef61d3a8/0bf4918dd83a4e92bc87fc575166e93f.html?locale=en-US

No Valid Payment Method Found or other errors related to payment method.
The reason for this can be wrong combination of payment method and house bank accounts, incomplete configuration settings, missing of certain parameters, etc. For more information about payment method related errors and trouble shooting, see SAP Knowledge Base Article 2671294 Information published on SAP site.

In this note you will see reference to Configuration activity  Set Up Bank Determination for Payment Transactions id 101045

..

Configuration of the Payment Method with Bank:

Configuration activity: Set Up Bank Determination for Payment Transactions (ID 101045) Ranking Order and Bank Accounts.
Ranking Order: You specify which house banks are permitted and rank them in a list. The smaller the number, the higher the rank.
This process includes the following steps:
a) Rank the house banks based on the payment method and the payment currency.
b) Specify the accounts and the subaccounts for the house banks

Bank Accounts: For each house bank and payment method (and currency, if required), you specify which bank account is to be used for payments.
..

Review note in full.

entry.title: Re: Process order settlement with actual quantity
entry.content:
Hi @SMuthukumar ,

Normally, during the Preliminary Settlement for Co-Products (CO8A), no costs should be posted into the coproducts (order items) without output. This ensures you don't get any variances and price differences (PRD) for these coproducts.

Please check the default rule you are using for your order type/plant (OPL8). Please check the help guidance for this. Eg. PP6 default rule will probably be the best option for you.

I hope this helps.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: Re: Application for digital skills initiative
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 
I had completed my Learning Journey (Implementing S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition) on November 13th and sent the screenshot of the same along with my SAP Community username (R266) to digitalskills@sap.com However, I haven't yet received the Campaign code for the certification attempt. 
Attaching the screenshot of the learning journey completion here for your reference.
Could you please help?


Regards
Robin

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay Bonus Payout - standard fields
entry.content:
Hi @S0026446342 

From your screenshot you are not getting the Individual Section Amount to calculate which is a prerequisite for Goals payouts to calculate.

 

Path in VP is : Basis field in Employee History gets prorated to make the Target Bonus amount of each assignment, that amount then gets split based on Bonus Plan Section Weights to make up the Section Amounts, then the Section Amount gets split into Goal Basis based on goal weight (business or individual). If any of the steps below is missing, there is no payout calculated for a goal.

entry.title: MIC Results not displayed or recorded in IW32 Order Checklists List of results Insp. Characteristic
entry.content:
Hello,

After genetaring a checklists in a order (release + save).  We try to enter the result in the Checklists tab / List of results.  When choosing a catalog code in Result colunm of a Inspection characteristic in editing mode, the code and its definition appear correctly.  When I save, the results disappear even though the message "Saved Sucessfully." Message No. EAM_IDMS204
In table QAME the entries of the inspection lot are there but I don't see the result.  And there is no entries in QASR.  

 When Using QE02 to enter a result, after saving we still see the result in Change Results: Characteristic Overview but not in List of results of order (IW32) Checklists tab.

In IW32, BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS is called but not in QE02.

Is there a way to make the result appear in this ALV ?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Automated currency conversion to local currencies and...
entry.content:
Hi @sergok 

This is an Employee Central > Compensation Information topic and unfortunately not Compensation module related, could you please remove the "SAP SuccessFactors Compensation" tag ? 

In the compensation module we have the flexibility to publish back to EC in any currency we want:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-publish-back-payouts-in-a-different-currency-than-the-local-currency/ba-p/13569346

Thank you and best of luck with the enhancement request ! I can't vote since I am SAP but it looks like it could be a useful EC feature.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Error when trying to create the export declaration
entry.content:
Hello community

We are having an issue trying to create the export declaration in TM. 

The configuration was performed as indicated in the implementation guide called “Integration of SAP TM with SAP Global Trade Services”, however when trying to create the export declaration the following errors appear:

We cannot find where the system is searching and verifying this data

Can you help us?

Thank you in advance

Augusto.

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content:
Thanks for this blog, @SamannayaRoy. Well explained !

In case we want to add this PO field to the field catalog for procurement pricing, what would be the changes needed ?

We've tried creating the field under SD_PRICECOMHEAD business context for it to show in the config and it did. But then we can't access this field at the PO level

Thoughts ?

Thanks in advance,
Hamza

entry.title: Re: Type "Class name " is unknown.
entry.content: I had the same problem, and I noticed that if you log off and then login the issue is automatically fixed.  I guess if you activate the class  /LPROFILE/ZCL_P2D_KPI in the same session as the consumer class, some kind class name cache is not automatically refreshed.

entry.title: Re: Process order settlement with actual quantity
entry.content: HI Filipe_Magalhaes,

entry.title: Re: Process order settlement with actual quantity
entry.content: Hi Filipe_Magalhaes, Thanks for your response, we are using PP_PI where the default rule PP6 cannot be added in our default rule as per the S Note 2556826 - Error message C5624 when changing default rule in t-code COR4

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract - Fixed Amount Distribution in Set...
entry.content:
Hi @arindamsur, 

The behavior you’re observing is standard in SAP CCM for calculating a fixed amount (calculation type B) in the settlement document. This is driven by the standard pricing routine 214 assigned to the rebate condition in the pricing procedure, specifically the logic within the following method:

If you’re considering modifying this logic, I strongly recommend conducting thorough regression testing. Adjusting this standard calculation may lead to unintended issues, such as complications when the settlement includes only negative line item business volumes (BVs).

That said, from a broader perspective, SAP ensures that the fixed amount is calculated and posted correctly at the document level. This behavior aligns with the standard design of SAP CCM.


Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Public-Sales-Billing form -txt n' logo-What is the right masterform template for GB (great britain)?
entry.content:
I would like to know what is the right Master form for GB Billing form templates.

I've tried to use: 

SOMU_FORM_MASTER_LETTER
SOMU_FORM_MASTER_A4

 

Both of them the Header text (company address) doesn't appears in the output document.

I've checked and the footer is working fine, so I suppose its something related to the page size.

I've been doing this configuration for Brazil and with A4 the header text is there, but for GB none of the 2 options doesnt work.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP PAPM Cloud Universal Model: Importance of Function Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am here again to share with you this time a very short blogpost of an important functionality with respect to SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud, Universal Model (SAP PAPM Cloud UM).

If you are a modeler, most likely you already have encountered and have seen the Function Sequence buttons such as Up, Down, First, Last.

 

At first glance you might assume that these buttons are purely for visual and organizational point of view. But did you know that these are powerful buttons that can stir your model's logical calculation result and function trigger priorities?

 

For example, let me ask you a simple question. 

In Collection, if you add several functions as inputs, which one will be triggered or called first upon run action?
Some of you will answer "the first collection input", maybe some would say "alphabetical". 
but of course some of you answered it right --- "It depends on function sequence". 😊

Yes you got it right! Function sequence sets the priority of the functions and provides more clarity and guidance for the system to identify which must be triggered first specially in a complex model that could have a "chicken or egg" or complex predecessors situation. 

 

Let me give you one of the very simple scenarios where we can already encounter the right use of Function sequence. 

ℹ️ Additional Information
The screen you are seeing below is from Universal Model called Model Screen which provides visual modeling experience to the modelers just like in Standard Model. But that is for another blogpost, so please stay tuned! 😉

As you can see, the simple environment above shows a conflicting sitution.
How did I say so? If you look at the predecessor functions of Join UnionAll - 03, it says here that Join Unionall - 01 and View 01 are of the same distance (Distance 02) but at the same time View 01 is tagged as Distance 03 and is actually an input of Join UnionAll - 01.

With such situation, how would Join UnionAll - 01 behave? As they are also of the same distance, Join UnionAll - 01 will expect an already triggered result of View 01 and will use the buffered data. This is nothing unusual and for seasoned modelers, you have already experienced this. Remember something like...

"I triggered the function and the result was ok. After changing a formula of such function, reactivate, and run the full chain, the result being produced still comes from the old run" 

or something like

"I executed a run of the final function in the chain, and it did not produce a result. But if i run the predecessor functions one by one, then trigger the final function - the result was correct" 

 

These are not system nor run inconsistencies, but something that we as usual modelers should always put in mind ---- for such situations, please do not forget to recheck your function sequence. 

 

Before I explain further let us simplify the terms, since it might get confusing to discuss the topics by mentioning all functions I have, let us  call it green stream

and red stream

Since we already know that the green stream will just "read" the buffered data of View 01, we need to ensure that the red stream is called in first when executing. Let me show you what will happen if green stream is called in first in the Join UnionAll - 03 function.

 

As you can see in Manage Functions , View 02 has an earlier sequence number, with such upon run action of Join UnionAll - 03, it will consider green stream first prior the red

Due to this, without knowing the logic behind my modeling, you would notice that Model Entity 02 has been called in both Red and Green stream. And since I am just using UnionAll, we should expect two set of entries from Model Entity 02 (Those with Customer and Product starting with ME2). But you can see that this is missing in Green stream.

This just proves, that this chain reads buffered data from View 01. And since it was never executed yet and had no buffered data, it returned an empty result from Model Entity 02 > View 01 stream.

What if we make sure that red stream has earlier functions sequence number than of green?

⚠️ Reminder
Make sure to reactivate your environment after changing function sequence

 

Here is the result of the run -- one additional line!! Just a simple visual representation that the green stream produced the right result (now with proper buffered View 01 produced data) 

 

 

Alright, as I promised this will be a very simple and fast blogpost! I hope you have better appreciation now with the Up, Down, First, Last buttons. 😊 Bye for now and happy modeling in the cloud!

.

.

.

. 

 

ℹ️Additional Information

There are functions that are automatically considered to be triggered and will always produce new set of data regardless of the sequence and complexity of the environment to ensure proper results will be provided.  

These functions are automatically executed with Application Server's attention:
-- Writers (with or without connection)
-- Reader (to replicate data for Odata and SAC)
-- Iterative View

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Time Management Workshop agenda an...
entry.content:
I have just used the workbooks in the past. Since they can be a little technical, I did spend some time in advance to hide columns and maybe change the wording to be easier to understand. I also merged the Time Off and Time Sheet workbooks so that items like Time Type were not duplicated in 2 separate workbooks. I also added some tabs for extra items that needed more detail. Even though this is not really in questionnaire format, it was what the customer was going to have to sign off on, so I wanted them to be able to understand what was in it.

Thanks,

Cindy

entry.title: Re: Webclient - Unrecognized SSL message, plaintext connection?
entry.content: Hi guys, I have activated the web client using SUSE with sudo ./startup.sh start While the SUSE root session is active, the web client works, if I close the SUSE session, the SAP web client stops working. Maybe this has happened to you?

entry.title: Re: Operation Reporting API - Default Filter for Full Access
Re: Operation Reporting API - Default Filter for Full Access
entry.content: Thank you for response. I have created Filter Expression for Unique Names. I want this to be optional. If I don't pass Unique Name filter, Its not returning any data because of Unique Names Fiter expression, I have given "=" as * which is not valid.

entry.title: ONB -> EC MDF Object Integration, what happens when EC MDF object has a parent-child relationship?
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

After following some blogs from the community, trying to collect data with MDF Objects in the Additional Data Collection Step in Onboarding and pass it to the MDF Objects from EC, we realized that when the Employee Central MDF Object has a parent-child relationship, the solution provided in these blogs doesn´t work. 

Does anyone know if it is also possible to use the Integration Center when the objects in EC have this kind of relationship or the solution provided by these blogs is just applicable when the destination MDF in EC are individual. If it is possible then, what are we missing?

If not, what could we do to workaround this limitation?

Here are the blogs mentioned in this post:

 ONB-EC Integration: Sending data from Custom Data ... - SAP Community

Collecting Vaccine Data from Onboardee with SAP Su... - SAP Community

 

Thank you so much for sharing you´re knowledge. 

 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding OData SAP SuccessFactors HCM Core

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content:
Hello Nikola

About the IP Range so the IP's are Public not privated. So these IP ranges belong to the network who want to access to the appliance correct?  no the appliance itself

For example

Company A want to connect to Appliance, Network: 100.20.30.0/24

Company B want to connect to Appliance, Network: 200.20.30.0/24

If both companies wnat to use Appliance. Both network shoul be added in the parameter shown?

Thanks for your correct explanation.

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to get rid of Close Document Prompt ?
entry.content: it is a new feature in 4.3 SP04, but I also don't know how to switch it off

entry.title: Re: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'SAP Business Technology Platform' (Virtual, November 21, 2024)
entry.content: This is indeed a good session with a good amount of depth. Please could you check why the presentation is not downloadable? Viewing it online is not always convenient.

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content: Yes, it supports multiple IP ranges.

entry.title: PR/PO Creation with Mix of Service and Material Items
entry.content:
We have a requirement of creating PR/PO with the mixing of Service and Material items. 

Currently, we mapped the CIG of PurchaseOrderExport with the validity start date & validity end date of the first item to the header. 
Therefore, we have the limitation that we need always to put the service item as the first item, otherwise it will fail. 
However, we need to find a way to successfully create PR/PO with this combination with any order. We have tried mapping the validity start date & validity end date with for-each where the validity start date & validity end date are not empty. This works when we have only one service item but fails when we have multiple service items as it sends (StartDateOfServiceItem1,StartDateOfServiceItem2,...) to the header level (which can accept only one value).

entry.title: Re: Application Practice of Batch Cost Method in SAP
entry.content: 不好生意，之前可能我表达的需求有歧义，我的理解是：您回复的功能对分类型进行成本的移动平均核算；我这边向表达的需求为：A批次成本为100，B批次成本为120，出库时如为A批次成本按100结转销售成本，如为B批次成本则成本按120结转销售成本，系统是否能够实现

entry.title: Re: Application Practice of Batch Cost Method in SAP
entry.content: 产品都是通过采购进来的，依据采购订单进行批次的成本核算，

entry.title: Facing issue while Decoding Base64 Encoded PDF in CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to decode a Base64 Encoded pdf in CPI with the standard Base64 Decoder but it looks like the Decoder generating faulty PDF as after saving the content as .pdf it is not opening , showing document is damaged and can't open the file.

I tried to Decode the same Base64 string on Notepad++ and saved the decoded content as .pdf. The file is opening perfectly.

Even I tried replacing the Standard Decoder with Groovy but issue still persists, Please suggest how to resolve this.

 

Regards,

Arvik
